articles.title: At 22, she’s running Boston for her mom — and a future without Alzheimer’s
articles.description:
At 22, Ella Wright is running the Boston Marathon to honor her mom’s dream and raise awareness for early-onset Alzheimer’s.

The post At 22, she’s running Boston for her mom — and a future without Alzheimer’s appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ella Wright, 22, is running the Boston Marathon to honor her mother.
She aims to raise awareness for early-onset Alzheimer's disease.
The marathon takes place on April 17, 2023, impacting local Alzheimer's advocacy.

articles.title: Plymouth officer charged with child rape suspended by POST Commission
articles.description:
Samantha Pelrine pleaded not guilty last week to several counts of child rape.

The post Plymouth officer charged with child rape suspended by POST Commission appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Plymouth officer Samantha Pelrine charged with multiple counts of child rape.
Pelrine pleaded not guilty last week to the serious charges.
Suspension by the POST Commission affects local law enforcement credibility.

articles.title: After 7 e-bike incidents in 10 days, Mass. police chief warns of impending ‘tragedy’
articles.description:
Milford police issued the warning after a 15-year-old lost control of an e-bike and collided with a car.

The post After 7 e-bike incidents in 10 days, Mass. police chief warns of impending ‘tragedy’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Milford police report seven e-bike incidents in ten days, raising safety concerns.
A 15-year-old was injured in a recent collision with a car while riding an e-bike.
Local authorities urge Boston residents to prioritize safety to prevent potential tragedies.

articles.title: Bridgewater police warn of Tom Brady impersonation scam
articles.description:
The victim sent gift cards to the scammer posing as the former Patriots quarterback, police say.

The post Bridgewater police warn of Tom Brady impersonation scam appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bridgewater police report a scam involving impersonation of Tom Brady.
Victims sent multiple gift cards to the scammer posing as Brady.
Residents are urged to verify identities before sending money or gifts.

articles.title: This Boston Marathon runner is supporting children in their hardest times
articles.description:
Maria Castaneda is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for The Children's Room.

The post This Boston Marathon runner is supporting children in their hardest times appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maria Castaneda is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support The Children's Room.
The Children's Room provides grief support for children and families in Boston.
Castaneda's efforts aim to raise awareness and funds for local youth in crisis.

articles.title: Review and setlist: Lady Gaga’s Mayhem Ball brought the spectacle, but Boston brought the heart
articles.description:
Boston’s first of two Gaga shows delivered gothic theatrics, arena-sized pop, and a fan tribute that left Gaga in tears.

The post Review and setlist: Lady Gaga’s Mayhem Ball brought the spectacle, but Boston brought the heart appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lady Gaga performed at TD Garden on March 29, 2026, captivating Boston fans.
The concert featured gothic theatrics and a heartfelt fan tribute that moved Gaga to tears.
Boston residents experienced a unique blend of pop culture and emotional connection during the event.
